name: decoration-overlay
role: Positioned-absolute decorative layer over a container. CSS-generated grain / texture / pattern / gradient. Forward-looking primitive shipped Phase 22 Cons. 7 for future aesthetic-pack consumption (Boeing Watch, paper-grain hero variants, etc.).

role.note: Grain = fine noise (SVG turbulence or CSS-generated). Texture = larger-pattern repeating fill. Pattern = geometric repeat (chevron / dots / stripes). Gradient = color blend (often radial).

blend.note: CSS mix-blend-mode for the decoration layer over its container.

meta.performanceBudget: 5% LCP impact maximum (v3.G.14). Overlays must paint AFTER critical content; consumers MUST use will-change sparingly and prefer CSS-generated decoration over SVG/image references where possible.

ariaPatterns.decorative: Always aria-hidden="true". Decoration must NEVER carry meaning required by the page; consumers verify meaning is in text content.

anticipated-consumers: @quoin/aesthetic-boeing-watch (D.65) — texture and grain overlays on dashboard surfaces
future hero variants — paper-grain composed alongside gradient-mesh
